title: astragalus incurvus
intro: Astragalus incurvus, also known as the "incurved milkvetch," is a type of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus incurvus include improved immune function, reduced stress, and enhanced cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
